martha.name: Martha
martha.comment: Martha, perfect evening for a run, around 18-20°C and hardly any wind - the 18:00-20:00 window looks ideal, with a score of 98. You might even convince Britt to join you if you promise a drink afterwards. Just don't forget the sunscreen, it's still a high UV day.

britt.name: Britt
britt.comment: Britt, running's looking great today, especially between 18:00–20:00 when it's calm and dry. Temperatures will be around 19°C, perfect for a relaxed jog. Maybe drag Martha along when she gets home and enjoy a drink on the terrace afterwards?
